member.name: T:UrlShortener.AnalyticsService.Consumers.UrlRedirectedEventConsumer
member.summary: Consumes URL redirected events and updates URL redirect statistics.

member.name: M:UrlShortener.AnalyticsService.Consumers.UrlRedirectedEventConsumer.#ctor(UrlShortener.AnalyticsService.Persistance.AnalyticsDbContext)
member.summary: Consumes URL redirected events and updates URL redirect statistics.

member.name: M:UrlShortener.AnalyticsService.Consumers.UrlRedirectedEventConsumer.Consume(MassTransit.ConsumeContext{UrlShortener.Messaging.Contracts.Events.UrlRedirectedEvent})
member.summary: Handles UrlRedirectedEvent messages. Creates a new statistics record if it does not exist, otherwise increments click count and updates last redirect date.

member.name: T:UrlShortener.AnalyticsService.Controllers.AnalyticsController
member.summary: Provides endpoints for reading URL redirect analytics.

member.name: M:UrlShortener.AnalyticsService.Controllers.AnalyticsController.#ctor(UrlShortener.AnalyticsService.Persistance.AnalyticsDbContext)
member.summary: Provides endpoints for reading URL redirect analytics.

member.name: M:UrlShortener.AnalyticsService.Controllers.AnalyticsController.GetStatistics(System.String)
member.summary: Gets redirect statistics for a short URL code.
member.returns: URL statistics if found; otherwise 404 Not Found.
